data.title: When Are Your Deposits Flagged? Understanding How And Why Banks Report Transactions To The IRS
data.description: Large or repeated deposits can be reported to the IRS, as required by the Bank Secrecy Act. Unusual patterns may also be reported. The IRS can use this information for audits or to uncover unreported income.

data.title: Jim Cramer Says Pre-Market Slide Driven By Profit-Takers: 'Shorts Are Trying To Figure Whether To Operate On Nvidia, AVGO, AAPL'
data.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer has weighed in on pre-market decline, attributing downward pressure to the "profit-takers" who bought the dip.

data.title: Jeremy Clarkson's 'Trolley Problem' Question About Driverless Cars From Ages Ago Continues To Pose A Moral Dilemma For Auto Makers
data.description: Jeremy Clarkson sparked debate on how driverless cars should handle life-or-death situations. Public opinion prefers saving more lives, but legalities remain murky.

data.title: Top 3 Health Care Stocks That Could Lead To Your Biggest Gains In Q2
Bill Ackman Feels The Sting: Pershing Square Portfolio Down 14% Year-To-Date Amid Tariff Volatility
data.description: Hedge fund titan Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Holdings, a closed-end fund listed on the London Stock Exchange is down 14% year-to-date, owing to tariff-related market volatility. The losses, however, have only been calculated through April 8th, and don't include the massive rally on Wednesday, as reported by Reuters.
